results.rendered_html:
samyac, samyaṃc a. (samīcī f.)
1 Going with, accompanying.
2 Right, fit, proper, due.
3 Correct, true, accurate.
4 Pleasant, agreeable; kiṃ ca kulāni kavīnāṃ nisargasamyaṃci raṃjayatu  R. G. 
5 Same, uniform.
6 All, whole, entire.
— ind. ( samyak)
1 With, together with.
2 Well, properly, rightly, correctly, truly; samyagiyamāha  Ś. 1 ;  Ms. 2. 5 , 14. 
3 Duly, suitably, correctly, truly.
4 Honourably.
5 Completely, thoroughly.
6 Distinctly.
Comp.
— pāṭhaḥ a correct reading or recitation.
— prayogaḥ proper use, due
(pb) application.
— pravṛttiḥ f. the right direction (of the organ).
— vṛttiḥ f. steady practice, regular discharge of duties.
